intro.text: I am Obscura. I see the light in darkness and the shadow in light. Your mind is an open book to me... but can you close it in battle?

win.text: Intriguing. Your mind resisted my sight. The Eclipse Badge is yours. You are more than you appear.

lose.text: Your thoughts betrayed you before you even moved. Still your mind, and perhaps next time the shadows will be kind.
